findings.name: Low contrast text
findings.description: Text does not meet WCAG AA contrast requirements (4.5:1 for body, 3:1 for large text). Increase the contrast between text and background.

findings.name: Line length too long
findings.description: Text lines wider than ~80 characters are hard to read. The eye loses its place tracking back to the start of the next line. Add a max-width (65ch to 75ch) to text containers.

findings.name: Tiny body text
findings.description: Body text below 12px is hard to read, especially on high-DPI screens. Use at least 14px for body content, 16px is ideal.

findings.detail: Cyan neon text on dark background
findings.name: AI color palette
findings.description: Purple/violet gradients and cyan-on-dark are the most recognizable tells of AI-generated UIs. Choose a distinctive, intentional palette.

findings.detail: Cyan neon text on dark background
findings.name: AI color palette
findings.description: Purple/violet gradients and cyan-on-dark are the most recognizable tells of AI-generated UIs. Choose a distinctive, intentional palette.

findings.detail: Cyan neon text on dark background
findings.name: AI color palette
findings.description: Purple/violet gradients and cyan-on-dark are the most recognizable tells of AI-generated UIs. Choose a distinctive, intentional palette.

findings.name: Dark mode with glowing accents
findings.description: Dark backgrounds with colored box-shadow glows are the default "cool" look of AI-generated UIs. Use subtle, purposeful lighting instead — or skip the dark theme entirely.

findings.name: Skipped heading level
findings.description: Heading levels should not skip (e.g. h1 then h3 with no h2). Screen readers use heading hierarchy for navigation. Skipping levels breaks the document outline.

findings.name: Layout property animation
findings.description: Animating width, height, padding, or margin causes layout thrash and janky performance. Use transform and opacity instead, or grid-template-rows for height animations.
